text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day, folks! It's the second race of the
Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which Umamusume will step up as today's
heroine? Let's see their glory blossom on the
track!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
This year's Tiara tour has been dramatic, to say
the least!

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
The powerhouse Vodka has left the tour. Is she
taking the limelight with her, or will a new star
rise in her absence?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I've entered the Japanese Oaks, just like we
planned.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
And just like we planned, I'm going to get first
place. Then they'll all see what I'm made of.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: As if. I'll run just like I always do.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Even if she's not here to see it...
